title: olearia aglossa
intro: Olearia aglossa, also known as the Mountain Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing several health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Olearia aglossa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
